items.name: Forsaken Maskroot
items.description:
“They carved it from the oldest tree in the Hollowing Woods. The roots bled. The mask watched.”

Once worn by the first Maskroot cultist who vanished beneath the forest floor, this cursed mask still hums with the whispers of the buried. Its triple eye sigil marks you as one of the Forsaken those who see what should never be seen. The antlers aren’t grown. They’re taken. And the stains? Not all of them are yours.

Wearing this may attract the attention of something ancient. Something hungry.

items.name: Netherland Fedora: Korbloxborn Veil Fedora
items.description:
Step into shadows and style with the Netherland Fedora: Korblox Veil — a sleek black fedora touched by ghostly teal glow and crowned with a silver band of prestige.
This hat isn’t just fashion — it’s mystique. Crafted for wanderers of the forgotten realms, its dark aura speaks of old Korblox secrets and unseen dimensions.
